Short CV

Şerife Kelle Dikbaş graduated from Maltepe University, Department of Nursing in 2014. She started her master's degree in Koç University Psychiatric Nursing in 2014 and completed it in the same department at Medeniyet University in 2020. She is continuing her doctorate education in the Department of Nursing Fundamentals at Istanbul University Cerrahpaşa. She has 8 years of clinical experience in neonatal nursing, wound care, intensive care nursing, stroke nursing and has certificates in these fields. She is working as a lecturer in the midwifery department as of 2023.
